commands.review_summary:
The PR buffers Anthropic recovery `start` events until retry is no longer possible and adds a regression test for a start event followed by a thinking-signature stream error.

PR surface: Source +45, Tests +52. Total +97 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main treats `start` as yielded output, while `agentLoop` treats each `start` as a new partial assistant message. I did not run tests or live Anthropic proof in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed for the contributor live-proof gate and for deciding or correcting whether the broader linked root-cause issue should remain open after this partial recovery fix.
